name: Oatmeal Florentines
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt 1/4 cup shortening.
2. Add oats and cook, stirring on medium heat for 10 minutes or until the oats are golden brown.
3. Allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Grease baking sheets with shortening, then coat with flour. Shake off excess flour.
6. In a microwave-safe bowl, melt remaining shortening in 1-minute intervals until melted.
7. Add toasted oats, sugar, flour, egg, vanilla, baking powder, and cinnamon to the melted shortening. Stir until well blended.
8. Drop spoonfuls (about 3 inches apart) onto the greased baking sheets.
9. Bake for 8 to 9 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing carefully with a wide pancake turner to cooling racks.
